Blanka lets youbrand and sell private label cosmetics with zero hassle—zero inventory, zero upfront costs, and we handle fulfillment for you.
Pick from 450+ products to build your perfect collection.
You start selling and we'll
Preview your brand on hundreds of private label cosmetic products.
Explore your brand’s potential and order branded samples with zero commitment.
5% off all products and everything you need to launch your perfect product line.
10% off all products and more support to take things to the next level.
15% off all products and unlock Blanka's premium features to scale up your business.
Collaborate with our chemists and beauty experts to create fully custom product formulas.
Get Blanka products delivered straight to your salon, spa or barbershop.

Choose from over 450 high-quality private label cosmetic productsacross skin care, hair care, and more. It's 2025, do you even have to ask? Sustainable, certified, proven product formulas. Waiting for your personalization.
Preview products with your branding in minutes. From labels to packaging, we make itsimple to create a cohesive look that stands out.
Get your brand to market in minuteswith ready-to-go solutions, or take your time and create fully customized products with our expert private label manufacturing team.
From manufacturing and inventory tracking to shipping and fulfillment, Blanka’s ecosystem ensures a seamless experience so you can focus on growing your business.
Whether you’re just starting or scaling, our dedicated team of experts is here toguide you every step of the way.
Connect your new products and start selling with just a couple of clicks.
Premium skin care, hair care, makeup, and more– all ready for your brand.

scratch with our world class formulators.
